title: Variated Bush Sizes
description: A resource pack that makes the bushes randomly switch between vanilla sizes to make the normal and dead bushes match more.
body:
I felt that dead and normal bushes seemed a bit too unalike, so I fixed that. I made two variations of both of them. One shorter to match the new bush, and one taller to match the dead bush.

I hope you enjoy :)

It works in most versions, just note that in versions before 1.21.5, alive bushes won't exist.
